notes: Caller's wife is breastfeeding, has a 1 year 2 months old baby. She had a C-section. Experiencing severe stomach pain and acidity since afternoon/evening. Took Aciloc 150 last night. sentiment_summary: Caller is anxious and concerned about his wife's severe stomach pain and acidity, especially with a baby at home, making it difficult to visit the hospital immediately.
